name: chess-book-reader-backend
description: Wrapper scripts for the FastAPI backend (Python)

scripts.setup: python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch torchvision && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && npm run setup:models
